name: Last Guest
short_description: Last Guest is a first-person psychological horror game. You are a tired traveler who stops at a creepy roadside motel. The motel on the highway seems normal at first glance, but only at first glance. Strange staff and rumors about room 8 will make you question the reality of what is happening.
detailed_description:
Story:
It's late at night. It is raining. You are a traveler, tired after a long journey. The only shelter you have is an old motel on the highway. It looks ordinary: dim lights, a shabby reception desk, a polite but strange concierge. He keeps repeating one thing: don't go near the wall. He says something is wrong in Room 8. You stay the night and start looking for answers. What happened in this motel? Why is no one going into Room 8? And is it true that someone is still watching from inside?

Key Features:
An atmospheric game with no puzzles - just dialog and suspense
A creepy, detailed motel with unique characters
Each conversation reveals new dark secrets
A rich, short story (30-40 minutes)

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Greek, Danish, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese
